why: Token "brand/primary" is meant to be a single value (#ff6b35) but renders as 3 different values across the CSS, so the same intent looks different to users and no single change keeps them in sync.
fix: Standardize on #ff6b35. Replace the divergent literals at .btn-primary (deployed.css:26), .badge (deployed.css:37), .hero-cta (deployed.css:42) with the brand/primary token so they can never drift apart again.

why: #d94e28 is close to "brand/primary-dark" (#e2542a) but doesn't match it — a silent drift from the design system that erodes visual consistency.
fix: Change #d94e28 at .btn-primary:hover (deployed.css:33) to #e2542a, ideally by referencing the brand/primary-dark token instead of a literal.

why: #3b82f6 has no matching design token — it lives entirely outside the color system, so it won't respond to any design-system update.
fix: At .subscribe-btn (deployed.css:49), either switch to the nearest existing token or, if this value is intentional, promote it to a new color token in Figma.

why: 15px is close to "space/md" (16px) but doesn't match it — a silent drift from the design system that erodes visual consistency.
fix: Change 15px at .btn-primary (deployed.css:28) to 16px, ideally by referencing the space/md token instead of a literal.

why: 13px has no matching design token — it lives entirely outside the spacing system, so it won't respond to any design-system update.
fix: At .banner (deployed.css:59), either switch to the nearest existing token or, if this value is intentional, promote it to a new spacing token in Figma.

why: 17px is close to "text/body" (400 16px/24 Inter) but doesn't match it — a silent drift from the design system that erodes visual consistency.
fix: Change 17px at .lead (deployed.css:21) to 400 16px/24 Inter, ideally by referencing the text/body token instead of a literal.

why: #ffffff is correct today but hardcoded (it matches "neutral/surface"), so a future change to that token won't propagate here.
fix: Replace the literal #ffffff at :root (deployed.css:6), body (deployed.css:11), .btn-primary (deployed.css:27), .badge (deployed.css:38), .hero-cta (deployed.css:43), .subscribe-btn (deployed.css:50), .card (deployed.css:54) with a reference to the neutral/surface token/variable.

why: #1a1a2e is correct today but hardcoded (it matches "neutral/text"), so a future change to that token won't propagate here.
fix: Replace the literal #1a1a2e at body (deployed.css:10), h1 (deployed.css:16) with a reference to the neutral/text token/variable.

why: 24px is correct today but hardcoded (it matches "space/lg"), so a future change to that token won't propagate here.
fix: Replace the literal 24px at .hero-cta (deployed.css:44), .grid (deployed.css:63) with a reference to the space/lg token/variable.

fix: Replace the literal #2ecc71 at .success-note (deployed.css:71) with a reference to the feedback/success token/variable.

fix: Replace the literal 8px at .btn-primary (deployed.css:29) with a reference to the space/sm token/variable.

fix: Replace the literal 32px at .section (deployed.css:67) with a reference to the space/xl token/variable.
